prompt.content:
We, the loan team at Harbor Capital, are interested in analyzing one of our datasets containing a variety of loan information. This information is vital for us to be able to resolve our “Rate Crisis” situation. 

First, we want you to take the “enriched_loan_data.csv” dataset, and filter it for rows where the borrowing company’s annual revenue is three million dollars or more and the company has been in business for more than five years. Then, take those rows and put them in a new Excel (.xlsx) file named “enriched_loan_three_million.xlsx”. In “enriched_loan_three_million.xlsx”, create a new sheet and name it “Three Million Companies”. Inside this new sheet, for loans with a report date in the first six months of 2023, for each internal risk grade, calculate the average origination credit score. Repeat these calculations for loans with report dates in the second six months of 2023. Do not include any loans with no risk grade in any of these calculations. Finally, please round all average credit scores to three decimal places.

The averages and associated rounding reported in “Three Million Companies” should be computed using Excel formulas that would update if the data in the original sheet of “enriched_loan_three_million.xlsx” is modified. Give us the completed Excel file in your response, please.
